requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for Niger PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——尼日尔光伏逆变器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——尼日光伏逆變器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Niger does not appear to publish a solar-inverter-specific EMC rule comparable to large-market equipment schemes. For grid-tied, mini-grid, and donor-financed PV projects, IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and IEC 61000-series harmonic, flicker, immunity, and emissions evidence are the practical technical baseline. NIGELEC project engineers, ARSE review, national conformity authorities, or lenders may require model-specific EMC reports and power-quality calculations before connection or commissioning.
summary.zh: 尼日尔似乎未公开发布类似大型市场设备制度的太阳能逆变器专用EMC规则。对于并网、微电网和捐助方融资光伏项目，光伏功率变换设备IEC 62920以及IEC 61000系列谐波、闪变、抗扰度和发射证据是实际技术基准。NIGELEC项目工程师、ARSE审查、国家合格评定机构或贷款方可能在接入或调试前要求特定型号EMC报告和电能质量计算。
summary.zht: 尼日似乎未公開發布類似大型市場設備制度的太陽能逆變器專用EMC規則。對於併網、微電網和捐助方融資光伏項目，光伏功率轉換設備IEC 62920以及IEC 61000系列諧波、閃變、抗擾度和發射證據是實際技術基準。NIGELEC項目工程師、ARSE審查、國家合格評定機構或貸款方可能在接入或調試前要求特定型號EMC報告和電能品質計算。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Harmonic current emissions limits where applicable by current rating
IEC 61000-3-3 / IEC 61000-3-11 — Voltage changes, fluctuations, and flicker where applicable
IEC 61000-6 series — Generic EMC immunity and emission standards where project specifications invoke them
NIGELEC / project-owner power-quality and commissioning requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly included in GB/T 37408 and related China certification files. Testing may be performed by CNAS-accredited laboratories and may reference IEC 61000-derived methods, but the report scope, limits, test voltage, configuration, and certificate language may not match IEC 62920 or the project-specific IEC 61000 clauses requested in Niger. China EMC evidence should therefore be mapped clause-by-clause to the Niger tender and NIGELEC or lender requirements.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常包含在GB/T 37408及相关中国认证文件中。测试可能由CNAS认可实验室完成，并可能引用源自IEC 61000的方法，但报告范围、限值、测试电压、配置和证书语言未必匹配尼日尔项目要求的IEC 62920或特定IEC 61000条款。因此，应将中国EMC证据逐条映射至尼日尔招标文件及NIGELEC或贷款方要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常包含在GB/T 37408及相關中國認證文件中。測試可能由CNAS認可實驗室完成，並可能引用源自IEC 61000的方法，但報告範圍、限值、測試電壓、配置和證書語言未必匹配尼日項目要求的IEC 62920或特定IEC 61000條款。因此，應將中國EMC證據逐條映射至尼日招標文件及NIGELEC或貸款方要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 EMC certificates alone may not satisfy Niger project acceptance. Exporters should obtain or map IEC 62920 EMC type-test evidence, applicable IEC 61000 harmonic and flicker reports, conducted/radiated emissions and immunity reports, and power-quality studies for the exact inverter rating and grid or mini-grid configuration. Because Niger projects may operate on weak feeders or isolated hybrid networks, harmonic interaction, voltage fluctuation, and inverter stacking behaviour should be checked under local operating assumptions.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有GB/T 37408 EMC证书可能无法满足尼日尔项目验收。出口商应取得或映射IEC 62920 EMC型式试验证据、适用IEC 61000谐波和闪变报告、传导/辐射发射及抗扰度报告，以及针对具体逆变器功率等级和电网或微电网配置的电能质量研究。由于尼日尔项目可能在薄弱馈线或独立混合电网上运行，应按当地运行假设核查谐波相互作用、电压波动和逆变器并联行为。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有GB/T 37408 EMC證書可能無法滿足尼日項目驗收。出口商應取得或映射IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗證據、適用IEC 61000諧波和閃變報告、傳導/輻射發射及抗擾度報告，以及針對具體逆變器功率等級和電網或微電網配置的電能品質研究。由於尼日項目可能在薄弱饋線或獨立混合電網上運行，應按當地運行假設核查諧波相互作用、電壓波動和逆變器並聯行為。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice where NIGELEC, national conformity authorities, or donor/lender specifications require IEC EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T EMC evidence is a China-side technical baseline; it is not automatically accepted as IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 evidence in Niger

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Map China EMC files to IEC 62920 and the exact IEC 61000 clauses named by the Niger project. For weak-grid, mini-grid, or donor-financed systems, include power-quality analysis and local operating assumptions rather than relying only on a China GB/T EMC certificate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将中国EMC文件映射至IEC 62920以及尼日尔项目列明的具体IEC 61000条款。对于弱电网、微电网或捐助方融资系统，应纳入电能质量分析和当地运行假设，而不是仅依赖中国GB/T EMC证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將中國EMC文件映射至IEC 62920以及尼日項目列明的具體IEC 61000條款。對於弱電網、微電網或捐助方融資系統，應納入電能品質分析和當地運行假設，而不是僅依賴中國GB/T EMC證書。
